title: Os' Junimo Villagers (from Stardew valley)
description: This pack replaces the human villagers to cute little Junimo apples of various colors from Stardew Valley! It includes zombie villagers and the wandering trader, too. It adds 4 new sounds.
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis) # What Does This Pack Do? This pack changes the villagers, wandering traders, and zombie villagers to cute Junimo apple characters from Stardew Valley! Their leaf will change colors depending on their profession level.

The Wandering Trader is a deep blue with a gold leaf on its head. The unhappy Zombie Villager is a rotted brown. The regular Villagers come in 7 colors depending on the biome: - Red - Savanna - Yellow - Desert - Green - Plains - Blue - Snow - Purple - Taiga - White - Swamp - Black - Jungle ![Picture of all the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/rZe74cU.png) Please note, the hitboxes are the same size, and they will "hold" their offered trades/potions/milk buckets above their head without moving their arms. This is the limit of my skills in making entity models in game. Requires one of the following: * [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) * [Custom Entity Models](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-entity-models-cem) (Fabric) * [Entity Model Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric) (both Forge and Fabric) * [Fabulously Optimized](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fabulously-optimized) (Fabric) # ![Get 25% off your first month with Bisect hosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/c3960ebf-eb9a-4a08-b6b5-d9ea5104a60a.png)https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis # Usage Rights Using/modifying for personal use is allowed. Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page. Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute. Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures. # Social and Donation Links [![Join me on Discord](https://i.imgur.com/csRbGBw.png)](https://discord.gg/5fEusZCj72) [![Donate via PayPal](https://i.imgur.com/lGhDSBX.png)](https://www.paypal.me/emilybaucom94) [![Visit my Planet Minecraft page](https://i.imgur.com/zG48U4s.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/oslypsis/) [![Donate to The Trevor Project](https://i.imgur.com/0TpyVd4.png)](https://give.thetrevorproject.org/give/63307/#!/donation/checkout) [![Advertise here](https://i.imgur.com/zqkNdbZ.png)](https://emilybau.com) [![Click here to request a logo design of your own](https://i.imgur.com/AAMQcsI.png)](https://emilybau.com)
